---
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD"
title: "30. Critical Values of the *F* Distribution"
subtitle: "Reference Tables for Selected Numerator DF Values"
reference-location: margin
resources:
  - tables/make_f_critical_values_table.R
  - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.csv
  - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.tex
  - tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.pdf
---

This page reproduces a set of upper-tail critical values of the *F*
distribution for selected numerator degrees of freedom

$$v_1 = 1, 2, \ldots, 20, 22, 24, 26, 28, 30, 40, 50, \ldots, 100, 120, 140, 200, \infty$$

across a standard set of denominator degrees of freedom $v_2$ and upper-tail
probabilities. The printed `alpha(1)` row gives the one-tailed probability used
directly for the *F* quantile, and the `alpha(2)` row gives the corresponding
doubled value used when relating these cutoffs to two-sided procedures.

The source files are available here:

- [R script](tables/make_f_critical_values_table.R)
- [CSV values](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.csv)
- [LaTeX source](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.tex)
- [PDF table](tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.pdf)

These assets are stored in the repository and copied to the site as static
resources, so standard site builds do not recompute the table. To rebuild it
explicitly, run:

```bash
Rscript BCB744/basic_stats/tables/make_f_critical_values_table.R
```

The PDF below is produced by the R script and typeset in LaTeX.

```{=html}
<object data="tables/f_critical_values_v1_1_to_6.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1700">
  <p>The embedded PDF could not be displayed here. Use the download links above.</p>
</object>
```
